name: Calendar Application
description: Calendar application used for viewing calendar events. Calendar events can be uploaded to a local server to keep the calendar synced on multiple devices.

name: Remote Desktop Application
description: Allows for streaming a monitor at 60hz to 120hz over a local stable internet connection.

name: 3D Printed Computer Case
description: Computer case that fits an atx motherboard, 3 fan radiator, atx power supply, and a 2 fan graphics card. Case uses less than 2kg of filament.

name: Audio Streamer
description: Allows for streaming audio from one device to another over the internet.
